summary: Summary: Speaker1 begins the conversation frustrated and angry, reporting a lost green-and-gray travel backpack with important sentimental items after a Virgin Atlantic flight and describing having already spoken to multiple people. Speaker2 remains neutral, asks clarifying questions, explains airline policies and limitations, and offers a $50 voucher while asking about flight insurance; Speaker2 shows occasional frustration when constrained by policy but otherwise stays neutral and continues to search for the bag. As the dialogue progresses, Speaker1's emotion trajectory moves from frustration and anger to surprise and sadness at the lack of resolution, escalates criticism of the airline, and finally accepts the voucher and fills out forms with a mix of sadness and anger. Speaker2 ends the exchange neutral but intent on doing what they can to locate the luggage.
